# CWE-708: Incorrect Ownership Assignment (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-708-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

const serviceUID = 1000
const serviceGID = 1000
const spoolDir = "/var/app/spool"

// Safe: files are owned by the service account inside the controlled spool directory.
func FinishUpload(c *gin.Context) {
	name := c.PostForm("filename")
	clean := filepath.Clean(name)
	full := filepath.Join(spoolDir, clean)
	if !filepath.HasPrefix(full, spoolDir) {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	if err := os.Chown(full, serviceUID, serviceGID); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, "upload failed")
		return
	}
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
